BodyPilot Privacy Choices

Last updated April 26, 2026

Use these controls to manage local data, account deletion, notification consent, and privacy requests.

Open Privacy Settings Open Data Settings Privacy Policy Support

Export your data

Open BodyPilot, go to Settings, Data, and choose Export backup. The app downloads a local JSON backup file.

Delete your account

Open BodyPilot, go to Settings, Account or Settings, Privacy, and choose Delete account. This removes the local account record, coach-client links, and associated workspace data from the device.

Change notification consent

Open Settings, Notifications to turn push or email channels on or off and control reminder categories. Device-level push permission can also be changed in system settings.

Contact privacy support

Email support@bodypilot.app for privacy, access, deletion, or correction requests.
